tool.name: http_method_tester
tool.description: Test HTTP methods for security enumeration.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test all HTTP methods on an endpoint - Identify allowed and blocked methods - Test for HTTP method override vulnerabilities - Discover WebDAV methods - Find dangerous methods (PUT, DELETE, TRACE)

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action to perform: - test_all: Test all HTTP methods - test_method: Test a specific HTTP method - test_override: Test method override headers

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: Specific method to test (for test_method, default: GET)

parameter.name: target_method
parameter.description: Target method for override testing (for test_override, default: DELETE)

returns.description: Test results showing allowed methods and findings

tool.examples:
# Test all HTTP methods
test_all https://example.com/api/resource
# Test specific method
test_method https://example.com/api/resource PUT
# Test method override
test_override https://example.com/api/resource DELETE
